induction_input: The cat the dog chased escaped.
The book the student read inspired.
The car the mechanic fixed broke.
The house the builder designed collapsed.
The food the chef prepared spoiled.
l2_sentences: The old house that stood on the hill collapsed during the storm.
The children who played in the park ran home when it started to rain.
The book that I borrowed from the library needs to be returned tomorrow.
The man who lives next door works as a doctor at the local hospital.
The car that was parked outside was damaged by the falling tree.
